issues.description: Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but effect text states 'until the end of your opponent's next turn'. This requires duration 'DuringOpponentTurn' or equivalent multi-turn duration, not single-turn EndOfTurn.
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but effect text states 'until the end of your opponent's next turn'. This requires duration 'DuringOpponentTurn' or equivalent multi-turn duration, not single-turn EndOfTurn.

PowerBoost actions lack 'count' or 'maxCount' specification. Text says 'Select up to 2' characters total, but DSL shows two separate PowerBoost actions without indicating they are part of a single selection group of up to 2 targets.
